name: Release DO Format
html:
RELEASE / DELIVERY ORDER

{{ doc.name }} · {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.release_date) }}

Tank Owner: {{ doc.tank_owner or '-' }} Depot: {{ doc.depot or '-' }}
Shipper: {{ doc.shipper or '-' }} PIC: {{ doc.shipper_contact or '-' }}
Cargo: {{ doc.cargo or '-' }} Status: {{ doc.status }}
POL: {{ doc.pol or '-' }} POD: {{ doc.pod or '-' }} · ETD: {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.etd) if doc.etd else '-' }}
{% for row in doc.containers %} {% endfor %}
#Container NoSeal NoCargo Weight (kg)
{{ loop.index }} {{ row.container_no or row.container }} {{ row.seal or '-' }} {{ row.cargo_weight or '-' }}
{% if doc.notes %}

Notes: {{ doc.notes }}

{% endif %}
